subcodes.title: The Meaning of the "Mysteries"
subcodes.first_line: By “mysteries” is meant such matters and questions as are remote and hidden from the minds
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصد از سر مطالب و مسائلی که از عقول و ادراک خلق دور و مستور بعد چون شخص کاملی
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
